title: NFT Gate
description: Gate content or app features based on NFT ownership — verify whether a wallet holds any NFT in a collection, or a specific token ID, using GoldRush's ownership check endpoints.
useCase: Lock premium content, Discord roles, or app features behind NFT ownership — check if a connected wallet holds any token from a collection in a single API call.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to check ownership for
keyParams.tokenId: Specific token ID (optional — check for a single token)
